content: Islamia University of Bahawalpur transport schedule effective from 03 December 2025.
Route BJC to AC operates at 7:30 AM, 8:30 AM, and 9:30 AM in the morning.
Route AC to KH and FC includes bus numbers 1 to 25 and special buses SB1 and SB2 during morning hours.
Route KH and FC to AC operates with bus numbers 1 to 25 and special buses SB1 and SB2.
Route AC to BIC operates during morning hours starting from 7:00 AM with assigned bus numbers.
Afternoon transport services start from 12:00 PM onwards on all major university routes.
At 12:30 PM, routes include buses 1 to 25 and special buses SB1 and SB2 for AC to KH and FC.
At 1:30 PM, buses 5 to 18 operate from AC to KH and FC.
At 2:00 PM, AC to BIC route operates with buses 5 to 19.
At 3:00 PM, multiple routes operate including AC to KH, FC, and BIC with buses 1 to 25.
Evening transport services continue till approximately 5:00 PM for university bus routes.
Special buses SB1 and SB2 are included in selected routes during peak hours.
